senses.gloss: to give to the fire; to throw into the ashes
to be tedious for somebody, to appear as a source of vexation to, to tire, to weary
to be affected by heat, to be feverish

etymology.text:
From Tamil மூலை (mūlai, “corner, angle; point of compass”) or from Malayalam മൂല (mūla, “corner, angle; point of compass”).

See the etymology of the corresponding lemma form.
